title: deaconstruckdead graph schema
description: Emergent linking engine for the akabilly subdomain mesh. Nodes are content, edges are connections — some authored, most discovered.

id.description: Unique node ID, matches content slug or catalog ID

url.description: Canonical page URL for this node

surface.description: Display hints for when this node appears in DSD connections

preview.description: Short text excerpt, first line of lyrics, etc.

accent.description: Optional color hint derived from content

semantic.description: Machine-readable semantic hooks for AI discovery

textFingerprint.description: Hash or embedding ref for semantic similarity

type.description: Edge type. First six are authored, rest are discovered.

weight.description: Connection strength. Authored edges start at 1.0, discovered edges grow from activity.

origin.description: How this edge was created. Authored = hand-placed. Others are discovered.

confidence.description: For discovered edges, how confident the discovery signal is.

discoveredAt.description: When this edge was first created or last strengthened.

context.description: Human-readable note about why this connection exists.

bidirectional.description: Whether traversal works both ways. Most edges are bidirectional.
